title: Tanacetopsis paropamisica
taxonomy: Tanacetopsis paropamisica is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to Afghanistan and is part of the genus Tanacetopsis, which is a group of plants closely related to the genus Tanacetum. The family Asteraceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as daisies or sunflowers. Tanacetopsis paropamisica is likely classified as a perennial plant due to its growth habit, but this information may require further research for confirmation. As part of the Asteraceae family, Tanacetopsis paropamisica is a member of the order Asterales.
